caption: A man with a distinctive, tall, silver-grey hairstyle, wearing glasses and a white button-down shirt with a small bow tie, is seated in a studio setting. He wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a professional microphone. The background features a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and clothing items, including a shirt with the word "LEE" visible. On the left side of the scene, a logo reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" with a microphone icon. To the right, the text "BOSS TALK 101" is visible in red and black lettering. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking with slight variations in his facial expressions and mouth movements, indicating he is in the middle of a conversation or recording a podcast episode.
